definition: anxiety is a feeling of being afraid or worried that something bad will happen
example: Lucas’s voice was filled with anxiety.

definition: something that is extraordinary is unusual or special
example: It took an extraordinary amount of work to finish the report on time.

definition: if you heal someone or something, you make them healthy again with medicine
example: This medicine will help to heal the cut on your arm.

definition: if you say you are in a good mood, you mean you are happy
example: The boss is in a good mood today.

definition: an operation is when a doctor cuts open a person’s body to fix part of it
example: Mr. Jones is very sick and needs an operation.

definition: a painkiller is a type of medicine that helps you not feel any pain and feel better
example: The doctor gave my grandmother some painkillers when she broke her hip.

definition: if you suffer from something, you feel pain in your body or your mind
example: Many people suffer from mental health issues.

definition: if you treat an illness, you make it better with medicine
example: The medicine the doctor used to treat my flu worked very quickly.

definition: a wound is a serious cut or similar type of damage to the skin
example: Edith had a small wound on her knee after she fell on a rock.

definition: a condition is an illness
example: Your condition is serious and requires surgery.

definition: something that is ordinary is common or not special
example: Her paintings are of ordinary everyday objects in the home.

definition: if you burn part of your body, you hurt it with heat or fire
example: If you stand too close to the fire, you’ll burn yourself.

definition: ironing is an activity where you use an iron to make clothes smooth and straight
example: There was a lot of ironing to do after a week of being on vacation.

definition: something that is a warning shows or tells you something bad might happen
example: Because of her warning, I was careful.

definition: a signal is a sign that something might happen
example: A red light is used as a danger signal.

definition: depression is a sickness that makes you feel very worried or unhappy for long periods of time
example: Some students show signs of depression during exam periods.

definition: treatment is when you use medicine or exercise to make someone feel better or healthy again
example: The man is receiving treatment for shock after receiving bad news.

definition: post-traumatic stress disorder is a mental illness that some people get after seeing or living through something that is extremely scary and difficult, like war
example: Although post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD) starts after a traumatic event, other things also play a role in its development.

definition: an art is a skill in something specific
example: Learning to laugh at difficult things is an art.

definition: if you say you do nothing, you mean you take no action or just sit and relax
example: Margaretha is feeling lazy today and wants to do nothing.

definition: a concept is an idea or a principle
example: The concept is discussed more fully in Chapter 9.

definition: if you slow down, you become more relaxed and less active
example: When my parents stopped working, they started to slow down and relax more every day.

definition: if you schedule something, you plan a time for it
example: Let’s schedule the meeting for some time next week.

definition: if you say you want or need me time, you mean you are planning time for yourself to do what you enjoy or find relaxing
example: After working so hard this month, I need to take some me time and just relax.

definition: if you waste something, you use it badly or use too much when there is a limited amount
example: We only have 1m of paper, so we can’t waste any of it.

definition: if you make time for someone or something, you plan time to spend with them/on it
example: Can we make some time to meet next week to choose Anoushka’s gift?

definition: a blogger is a person who writes articles or blog posts for a blog
example: The blogger writes a new article every day for her blog.

definition: at the moment is right now
example: Faizan is a bit busy at the moment. Let’s talk to him tomorrow.

definition: if you switch something off, you make it not work, usually by pressing a button
example: Please remember to switch off the lights when you leave the room.

definition: something that is reusable can be used over and over again many times
example: Johann bought a reusable water bottle that he can refill when necessary.

definition: something that is level is the same height as something else
example: This bookshelf needs to be level to the others next to it.

definition: if someone is sensible, they make good choices that are safe and make sense
example: It was sensible of you to lock the door when you went to bed.

definition: heatstroke is an illness that includes headaches, a fever, and being very hot because a person has spent too much time in the sun
example: Giselle spent the whole day lying in the sun and has heatstroke now.

definition: a camp is a place with temporary accommodation like tents make a camp
example: We made a camp at the top of the mountain after hiking all day.

definition: an IV drip is a special bag with a long pipe and a needle that doctors and nurses use to give people medicine in the hospital
example: The nurse put me on an IV drip for a few hours because I was dehydrated.

definition: a tube is a pipe made of plastic, metal, or glass for liquid to flow through
example: Close the tube of toothpaste when you’re finished with it.

definition: if you ignore something or someone, you don’t pay attention to it/them
example: Ignore the last page of the letter; it’s not important.

definition: a crocodile is a large reptile, with a long mouth and sharp teeth, that lives in lakes and rivers
example: Be careful near the river as there are crocodiles in the water.

definition: a spider is a small animal with eight legs that catches and eats insects
example: In some cultures, spiders are a symbol of good luck.

definition: if you socialize, you enjoy the time you spend with other people
example: Aaminah loves to socialize and has many friends.

definition: a person who is in good shape is healthy and fit, usually because they exercise a lot
example: Matthieu is in such good shape because he spends a lot of time at the gym.

definition: if you prevent something, you stop it from happening
example: Learn from other people’s mistakes and prevent yourself from making the same mistakes.

definition: if someone has a fever, their body temperature gets higher because they are sick
example: Azamat is not feeling well. He has a headache and a fever. put on weight ˈpʊt ɑːn ˈweɪt/ phrase if you say you have put on weight, you mean you are fatter and/or heavier Since having a baby, Palesa has put on a lot of weight.

definition: someone who is exhausted is very, very tired
example: Lashyn hasn’t been sleeping well lately, so she’s exhausted.

definition: gratitude is the feeling of being thankful for things you have
example: She sent her friend a gift to show her gratitude for helping her.

definition: a sip is a very small drink at a time, not enough to fill your mouth
example: The tea is very hot, so take small sips.

definition: a traffic jam is when there are so many cars on the road that everyone has to drive slowly and it takes longer to get somewhere
example: Hugh was late for the party because there was a traffic jam on the road.
